column1: C[noob_bot_1: Hi! This is bot. Join 'noob_bot' group and have fun! Undo will be accepted. You can send undo message if you need.
C[noob_bot_1: Thanks for playing. If you want a weaker/stronger bot match with you, recommend try to play with 'ELOtest'. It can calculate & match your rank after few games.

quark: Thank you for the game, Sevvy.

C[sherwinpr: Sorry, misclick on phone, meant to play S14
C[SunPin: How're you doing?  You're the only opponent who is not talking.  :-)

SunPin: Cool to finally hear from you. :-)
C[Sevvy: :-)  Sorry, didn't mean to be all silent and mysterious. Just missed the chat entries somehow.
C[SunPin: Did not know what the ""share variation"" button did. Now I know. It shares your variation with your opponent. Weird.
